commands.command: PYTHONPATH=scripts python3 -B -c "import json,subprocess,types; from pathlib import Path; import lean_governance as c; B='642ab9a7f94e5d7f58c79cb8b4006485714aa90f'; gt=lambda p: subprocess.run(['git','show',f'{B}:{p}'],capture_output=True,text=True,encoding='utf-8').stdout; parse=c.governance.fallback_yaml_load; b=types.ModuleType('lean_governance_baseline'); b.__file__=f'{B}:scripts/lean_governance.py'; exec(compile(gt('scripts/lean_governance.py'),b.__file__,'exec'),b.__dict__); load=lambda p:(parse(gt(f\"{p['path']}/docs/governance/project.yaml\")),parse(gt(f\"{p['path']}/docs/governance/roadmap.yaml\")),[json.loads(x) for x in gt(f\"{p['path']}/docs/governance/events.jsonl\").splitlines() if x.strip()]); cfg=parse(Path('governance/projects.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); rows=[(str(p['project_id']),b.rendered_project_texts(*(facts:=load(p))),c.rendered_project_texts(*facts)) for p in cfg['projects'] if p['project_id']!='PFI']; diffs=[project_id for project_id,before,after in rows if before!=after]; print(json.dumps({'base_commit':B,'comparison':'non-PFI-rendered-text-byte-identity','checked_project_count':len(rows),'difference_count':len(diffs),'differences':diffs},sort_keys=True)); raise SystemExit(bool(diffs))"
